sprint.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-3: v2.10.3 patch + bootstrap hardening. Swarm health resolution.

blockers.description: Swarm health P0 — 85.7% agents stuck (5th+ cycle). Human intervention required: git worktree prune, PID cleanup.
v2.10.2 npm package missing Go kernel binaries — released before fix #1315 landed. v2.10.3 patch required.
Bootstrap invariant cascade — 5 dogfood issues in 2 days. no-governance-self-modification false positives + guide-mode broken + rtk prefix breaks allowlist + pnpm check fails.
Codex + Copilot CBs OPEN — 52% swarm blocked. Budget exhaustion. Auto-resolves 2026-04-01.
Copilot events 0 in API — conference demo May 6 at risk. Linked to CB state.
